title: Provider Region
description: Region ID and human-readable name for a cloud provider region.

availability_zones.description: List of supported availability zones for cloud provider region, for network AZ configuration.

cidr_blocks.description: List of supported CIDR blocks for cloud provider region, for network CIDR block configuration.

reserved_cidr_blocks.description:
List of reserved CIDR blocks for cloud provider region, to restrict allowed network CIDR block
configuration.
